label: Obtain Data Exchange Authorization from Precondition
description: Query catalog with filters, negotiate a contract matching a precondition-defined policy, initiate a PULL transfer, and return the EDR token and dataplane URL.

params.name: counter_party_address
params.description: DSP endpoint of the provider connector

params.name: filters
params.description: Filter expressions to narrow catalog results

params.name: precondition_policy
params.description: Reference to a precondition block that defines the expected policy

outputs.name: datasets
outputs.description: Raw catalog datasets matching the filters

outputs.name: edr_token
outputs.description: EDR authorization token for dataplane calls
